programmes.show_description: A woman accuses the ex-lover of her current boyfriend of ramming her car numerous times, kicking it and then harassing her. S23, Ep32
A young woman plans a cruise with her mother only to have the trip cancelled; she is accused of pocketing the refund and going on a cruise with her aunt. S23, Ep25
A veteran tree-trimmer is accused of felling a tree and damaging his client's porch. S23, Ep34
A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for the theft of a Corvette and for leaving his two large dogs with her when he walked out. S23, Ep35
Following a previous altercation, Cody Fisher was attending a Birmingham nightclub event with friends when he was attacked and stabbed in the chest, a 37-second fatal assault. S1, Ep5
16-year-old Hani Hicham Abou El Kheir was fatally stabbed in London, UK, over twenty times on his way home in 2013 by a gang of up to ten masked youths. S1, Ep6
Using geographical profiling, investigators close in on a serial rapist, and a cleverly obtained DNA sample confirms their suspicions. S5, Ep1
In 1984, a young woman is found murdered on the side of a rural Wisconsin driveway. Detectives initially have plenty of suspects, but the case remains unsolved. S16, Ep1
When a 22-year-old woman falsely confesses to a series of murders, investigators inspect incriminating fibres that lead to the real killer. S5, Ep2
Bill Sparkman is found hanging from a tree with the letters 'FED' scrawled on his chest. With little evidence, investigators turn to these letters for answers. S16, Ep2
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Top-notch forensic science helps solve crimes. A post-mortem on a badly burned body reveals he was stabbed 24 times. Police suspect that more than one criminal might be responsible. S7, Ep15
In 1996, a sexual attacker was tracked down and detained, but years later, new forensic science sheds new light on the case. S7, Ep16
Find out how man's best friend helped police track down the killer of a helpless couple. S7, Ep17
A woman falls into a fairytale romance, becomes pregnant and then gets terribly ill. Doctors assure her she's fine, but she's not so certain. S7, Ep18
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Faryion Wardrip was a typical, honest citizen on the outside, but a brutal serial killer on the inside. DNA testing proved to be his demise. S7, Ep19
Top-notch forensic science helps solve crimes. A car found on the road appears to have been abandoned suddenly. Later, the body of the driver is found... S7, Ep20
When mother of two Madeline 'Maddi' Kingsbury went missing, her distraught sister headed to TikTok and pleaded with the public to help find her. S36, Ep26
In October of 2023, Jessy Kurczewski went on trial for the intentional homicide of Lynn Hernan, along with two counts of felony theft for stealing from Hernan. S36, Ep27
Charlotte Pinkney vanished from Ilfracombe after going to a party. Police launched a murder hunt when her handbag was found in undergrowth - would they find the perpetrator? S4, Ep10
A Bournemouth hotelier called Peter Taylor gets away with murdering his wife in 1982; but when he conspires to kill his son-in-law nine years later, his luck runs out. S5, Ep1
In 2004, Zainab Begum from Lancashire, UK, vanished, and her daughter Samina grew suspicious when her brothers-in-law showed little concern. Her body was never recovered. S1, Ep7
In 2017, 15-year-old Kyron Webb was fatally stabbed on Moston Lane, Manchester, UK, by two masked youths. CCTV showed Kyron approaching the pair before being stabbed twice. S1, Ep8
A teenager sues his date for expenses after being stood up on the day of his prom. She denies faking an illness because she was interested in another boy. S10, Ep63
Punchy reality show. A teenager accuses his ex-girlfriend of being an unfit mother, she claims he beat her up and abused her children. S10, Ep65
A minister-in-training sues his ex-lover for malicious prosecution. She claims he is a con artist and owes her thousands. S10, Ep66
Punchy reality show about a female judge who has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S10, Ep67
Punchy reality show about a female judge who has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S10, Ep68

A woman says she can't sleep at night after being blindsided and attacked by a large dog on a friend's property. S23, Ep37
The police are called when a man allegedly kicks his landlord's dresser; the tenant says his landlord is a professional harasser and liar. S23, Ep36
Fascinating details about the flight of homing doves are revealed in this fight between two women over the alleged theft of 11 birds. S23, Ep38
A woman sells her home for three times what she paid for it and then sues a previous tenant for repairs; she claims over 55K in damages. S23, Ep39
A woman sends thousands to a man she has never met in person; she claims he is trapped in Afghanistan and the US military won't help him get home. S23, Ep40
When a vacation falls apart after an argument, a woman is accused of breaking into her ex-friend's garage to retrieve her van. S23, Ep41
A man denies repeatedly slamming his sister's arm in a screen door; he says he was just trying to get her out of his home after a heated argument. S23, Ep42
When motorists collide at high speed, both drivers are injured and blame each other for the accident. S23, Ep43
A complete stranger allegedly keys a six-foot scratch on the side of a woman's car with a Clinton bumper sticker. S23, Ep44
A man accuses his ex-lover of fraudulently registering his car under her name; she said he gave the car to her. S23, Ep45
In 2004, Zainab Begum from Lancashire, UK, vanished, and her daughter Samina grew suspicious when her brothers-in-law showed little concern. Her body was never recovered. S1, Ep7
In 2017, 15-year-old Kyron Webb was fatally stabbed on Moston Lane, Manchester, UK, by two masked youths. CCTV showed Kyron approaching the pair before being stabbed twice. S1, Ep8
The bodies of a woman and her son are found in a field. Insects found on the bodies and a suspicious blond hair help to track down the killer. S5, Ep3
A murder victim's final moments are caught on tape. The crime scene looks like a robbery-murder. Evidence points to a jilted ex, but will his alibi check out? S16, Ep3
The body of a man is found thirty years after he was murdered. Scientists try to decipher his blank address book, whose contents have faded with age. S5, Ep4
A woman sets out on her bike and never returns. Her body is found a few miles from her house, with a gunshot wound to the head. S16, Ep4
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A murdered US woman is found 230 miles from home, dumped from a bridge into swamp. Was she killed by someone she met online, or by her own husband? S1, Ep9
US police find the dismembered body parts of a missing woman in an alligator-infested creek. They must race to prove who was responsible for this killing. S1, Ep10
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
In October of 2023, Jessy Kurczewski went on trial for the intentional homicide of Lynn Hernan, along with two counts of felony theft for stealing from Hernan. S36, Ep27
When an unreliable, drugged up prostitute witnesses an attack on a helpless girl, and an unidentified body is found, police wonder if the cases are connected. S5, Ep11
In 1990, three sex workers are murdered. A serial killer was on the loose and detectives had few clues. Over 20 years later there's a break in the case. S16, Ep11
When the wife of a reputable doctor goes missing, investigators discover the doctor house hunting with another woman claiming to be his wife. S5, Ep12
A morning house fire kills the only doctor in a small town. An investigation quickly leads to the arrest of Jason Lively, the son of the doctor's nurse. S16, Ep12
A look at the case of teenager Alex Davies, who was murdered by Brian Healless after the pair met on the dating app Grindr. S1, Ep1
In April 2022, Katie Kenyon vanished from her home. A chilling investigation revealed her manipulative ex-boyfriend had trapped her in a cycle of fear. S1, Ep2
In 2019 in Hays, Kansas, Colby Trickle called 911 and said he woke up to his ears ringing and saw his wife, Kristen Trickle, bleeding next to him in the bed. S36, Ep28
The body of Jessica Knott is meticulously analysed and evidence reveals a startling truth about the killer. S7, Ep29
When a young woman vanishes, police suspect a man with a history of assault. But can they make a conviction? S7, Ep30
Investigators are flummoxed after a middle-aged woman is found dead in her home. The ex-wife of her husband could hold the key... S7, Ep31
A bloody trail leads investigators to a dead end at the scene of a bloody murder. Years later, advances in forensic techniques help find the killer. S7, Ep32
The Judge says anyone foolish enough to co-sign on a lease for a bunch of kids can't get one on their own! S23, Ep61
Two young boys are accused of bullying an allegedly unsupervised four-year-old and vandalising a car with a branch. S23, Ep62
The purchase of a Bengal cat by a beginner breeder ends with a fight over the pick of the litter and a cat's death. S23, Ep63
A newlywed says she had to purchase a last-minute wedding dress for $1,500 instead of $350 due to an allegedly shoddy fashion designer's work. S23, Ep64
A woman is admitted to hospital in 'deep shock' after allegedly witnessing her mother-in-law being attacked by their tax preparer's dogs. S23, Ep65
A woman sues her neighbour for the cost of a fence, harassment and damages for filing an allegedly false report with the health department. S23, Ep66
When cousins decide to go into business together, their first delivery attempt ends with threats from customers over damaged goods. S23, Ep67
